---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature for bst-library
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What is the problem this feature would solve? Link to an issue
or example if relevant.

## Proposed solution

What you want to happen. A short API sketch if it's a code
change.

## Alternatives

What other approaches have you considered?

## Backwards compatibility

Does this break the existing API? How?
